titleStmt.title: SII 34.416: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 416. Aruppukkōṭṭai, Aruppukkottai Taluk, Ramanathapuram District. On a slab set in a field 3 km east of the village.

summary.p: Sētupati, Tirumalai Sētupati Kātta Regunāthadēva, Dundubhi = A.D. 1682.

This is said to be a deed of gift (bhāgamānipam) by Uḍaiyattēvar younger brother and executive agent of the king, assigning land in the village of Bommākōṭṭai for the daily worship of Vāḷavandāḷ-ammai at Aruppukkōṭṭai for the latter's merit.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tuntumi varuṣam cittiraimā
§ śrīmatu tirumalaic cEtu
pati kāttarekuṉāta tēvarku
kartarṟāṉa tampi Uṭaiya
ttēvar Aṟuppukkōṭṭai
vāḷḷavantāḷammaikku pākamā
ṉip paṭṭaiyaṅ kuṭuttapaṭi re
kuṉāta tēvarukku puṇṇiyamāka
Ammaṉ nittakkaṭṭaḷaip pūcai
kku vēṇṭi pommā kōṭṭai
ppuravil vākaikkulai nāṉku E
lkaiyil Uḷpaṭṭa nañcai pu
ñcai māvaṭai maravaṭai tiṭṭu
tiṭal kīḷnōkkiṇaṟu mēl nō
kkiya maram Ammaṉukku nittappūcai
kkumāka māṉippaṭṭuk kuṭuttapaṭi
yiṉālē Intat tarumam cantirāṭṭacā
tāmpiṟakōṭiāṇṭaṉupaviccuk ko
ḷakkaṭavaṟākavum Intapaṭikku Aṉupa
viccuk koṇṭirukkumiṭattil A
paṇṇiṉavaṉ ke
ṅkaik karaiyilē kārām pacuvai
koṉṟa tōṣattilēyum pōkak kaṭavarā
ka piṉṉaiyum taṉ mātā pitāvai
yuṅ Āka
colappaṭṭa tōṣattilē pōkakkaṭavarā
kavum Intappaṭikku cammatittu pākamā
ṉiya paṭṭayam toṭṭukkuṭuttōm pom
mākōṭṭai tōḷmālai Aḻakittiyaṇaṉ
maṉa Aḻakikatta tēvaṉ mallaṉa[ yapaṭṭi makara
ca] ṉāyakkaṉ kaṭṭai keñcaṉ paṭi makkañ
ca ṉāyakkaṉ Ivarkaḷ collak kalveṭṭi
Eḻutiṉēṉ cokkāliṅkamācāri
Digital edition of SII 34.416 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
